title: Id::new and UTCDate::new empty-rejection not tested; Borrow<str> not tested
description: jmap.rs: (1) Id::new('') returning Err(EmptyError) has no test — core invariant of the type. Same for UTCDate::new(''). (2) Borrow<str> impl from impl_string_newtype! macro has no test verifying HashMap<Id,V>::get('literal') works. Both are load-bearing API contracts with zero test coverage.
